## Governance Impact

**1. This change makes which execution path harder?**
<!-- If none: label as observation / ceremony / housekeeping -->


**2. What concrete event would this prevent or alter?**
<!-- If only "better clarity": not governance-impacting -->


**3. Evidence basis:**
- [ ] prospective
- [ ] observed
- [ ] test-derived
- [ ] retroactive ‚Äî cannot promote enforcement

**Label:** `execution-impact` | `risk-sensitive-friction` | `observation-only` | `ceremony` | `housekeeping` | `identity-risk`

---
<!-- Only execution-impact or risk-sensitive-friction may count as progress toward operational governance. -->
